rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component types unless bindings require implementation-level annexes
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation scope in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings to implementation annexes
AGREE type declarations must use scalar names: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations may only reference visible features from their component type
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in implementation annexes instead of component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
